sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57828" key="kleyipote/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλεψι-ποτέω</orth>, <sense id="n57828.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drink unfairly</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
